descriptions.text: Elise is a Yume Nikki-like romhack in which you play as Elise, a fresh young adult who, in her despair, wished she could stay eternally asleep. This wish was granted to her and she is now wandering her own subconscious dreamworld. It is up to you to find all the dream drops, discover the story behind her predicament, and wake herself up from her slumber.
Elise or Elyse  may refer to:
